name: Pelikan M1000 Raden Sunrise
description: A radiant raden finish paired with a large 18K nib.
descriptionLong: One of Pelikan's most sought-after artisan models. It features refined raden textures and a reliable large piston-filling system.

name: Montblanc 149 Calligraphy Flex
description: A signature model combining the classic 149 body with a flexible nib.
descriptionLong: It delivers dramatic line variation under pressure while balancing heritage design and modern writing performance.

name: Namiki Emperor Vermilion Urushi
description: Layered urushi lacquer on an ebonite body, iconic in both tradition and presence.
descriptionLong: Known for its oversized body and expressive No.50 nib. The urushi surface develops deeper luster over time.

name: Sailor King of Pen Ebonite
description: A dense writing feel from a thick ebonite barrel and a large 21K nib.
descriptionLong: A standout model loved for restrained Japanese design and exceptionally smooth writing feel.
